name: 眾星之星落
icon: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/sange/sange.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/sange/sange.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.sange", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]

pages.text: 生於天地之間的我等，一直崇拜着上天的眾星。$(br2)在星辰永駐的森林之間，那些刀匠們打造出來了可與眾星相襯的刀劍，然後消失在眾星之間……$(br2)那些探索着暮光之森的人，被稱為星落者。在他們之中，有人得到了那些刀匠的遺產。$(br2)但很多人，或許連暮光之森都不知在何處……

pages.item: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/sange/sange.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/sange/sange.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.sange", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]
pages.text: 不知為何，散華作為其中一振眾星之刃，竟然藏在凋靈的體內。$(br2)但獲得它，需要用刀劍斬殺這個可怖的邪靈。

pages.item: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/agito.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/agito_false.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.agito", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]
pages.text: 暮光之森裏的大蛇娜迦持有着鄂門之名的利刃，但卻是鄂門的贗作。$(br2)但獲得它，需要用刀劍斬殺這條大蛇。

pages.item: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/agito.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/agito_true.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.orotiagito_sealed", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]
pages.text: 如同八岐大蛇一般棲息在暮光之森的九頭蛇持有着鄂門的真品。$(br2)但獲得它，需要用刀劍斬殺這條大蛇。

pages.item: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/yasha/yasha.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/yasha/yasha.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.yasha", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]
pages.text: 暮光之森的牛頭人持有着夜叉之名的贗作。$(br2)要獲得它，需要用刀劍斬殺這邪惡的牛頭。

pages.item: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/yasha/yasha_true.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/yasha/yasha.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.yasha_true", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]
pages.text: 暮光之森當中有奇怪的人身牛頭怪物持有着夜叉的真品。$(br2)但獲得它，需要用刀劍斬殺這邪惡的造物。
